title: Build registration API route
description: POST /api/auth/register — handles both passenger and driver signups.

subtasks.title: Input validation
subtasks.description: Validate required fields, email format, password strength, and duplicate email check.

subtasks.title: Role-conditional logic
subtasks.description: If role === 'driver', require licenseNumber and organizationName, and set status = 'pending'.

subtasks.title: Save user and respond
subtasks.description: Hash password, save document, return sanitized user object (no password hash) with success message.
